title: Dusk Lycanroc Battle Guide
summary: A fast [Rock] physical attacker with [tough-claws] — contact moves gain 30% damage, and 117 Attack / 110 Speed plus [accelerock] priority make it a clean offensive pick.
bodyMarkdown:
## Overview
Dusk Lycanroc is the fastest Lycanroc form with the [tough-claws] ability — contact moves deal 30% more damage. With 117 Attack, 110 Speed, and STAB [accelerock] priority, it's a well-rounded offensive threat that can either outpace or priority-kill most threats in the format.

## Strengths
[tough-claws] boosts [stone-edge], [close-combat], and [accelerock] to significantly higher damage output. 110 Speed outruns most natural-Speed attackers, and [accelerock] priority handles scarfed threats. The three-move offensive core ([accelerock], [stone-edge], [close-combat]) hits an enormous range of the meta neutrally or better.

## Weaknesses & Answers
Five [Rock] weaknesses plus 75/65/65 bulk mean Dusk Lycanroc cannot tank anything super-effective. Non-contact moves (like [rock-slide]) miss the [tough-claws] boost. Predict around these constraints by using priority and Speed to your advantage.

## Recommended Moveset
[accelerock] is the priority STAB. [stone-edge] is the max BP [Rock] STAB. [close-combat] is the [Fighting] coverage. [protect] is standard.

## Item · Ability · Tera
[life-orb] is the default. [choice-band] maxes damage. [tough-claws] is locked. Tera [Rock] stacks STAB, Tera [Normal] neutralizes the [Fighting] weakness.

## Teammates & Synergy
Cover [Water], [Grass], and [Ground] weaknesses with [Grass], [Fire], or [Flying] partners. Handle [Fighting] with [Psychic] or [Fairy]. [intimidate] support extends bulk.

## Play Patterns
Lead with speed advantage, [stone-edge] or [close-combat] into whichever split is weaker, and use [accelerock] to finish faster threats. Switch out of super-effective hits — the bulk won't save you.
